claim_boundary: Open-development approximation of computational Docking geometry only; not frozen-test, binding, affinity, experimental blocking, or formal validation evidence.

metric_contract.ef_at_10: precision among predicted top ceil(0.10*N), divided by prevalence of true top ceil(0.10*N)
metric_contract.ndcg: binary relevance defined by each true-top fraction; deterministic DCG at the declared predicted budget
metric_contract.recall_at_20: true top ceil(0.20*N) recovered in predicted top ceil(0.20*N)
